_comment: Export with signed/negative value fields (a real hazard: some accounting exports emit signed deltas, and a naive parser once let a negative silently become a neutral unit weight, distorting dirty-value totals). cryptotrace normalises each value to its finite, non-negative magnitude so the taint arithmetic stays sound. The real SDN entry is the Lazarus Group (DPRK) address 0x098b716b8aaf21512996dc57eb0615e2383e2f96 (DPRK3).
